caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a dark green hoodie, and a gold chain sits at a desk in a recording studio. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm, with headphones resting over his ears. On the desk beside him is a black equipment box and a white mug featuring the text "THE TALK OUT LOUD SHOW". Behind him is a white backdrop with the text "UNICORN HUSTLE" appearing multiple times alongside gold stars, and a sign above him that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". The man is holding a piece of paper in his hands and looking slightly to his left, speaking or preparing to speak. Across the sequence, the man remains in a consistent position, though his facial expression shifts slightly and he adjusts the paper in his hands, maintaining his focus toward the left side of the frame.
